name_cn:
『Balenciaga Balenciaga』
Crocodile 🐊 mint green silver buckle 🔥, Balenciagα heavy Hourglass bag for this season. Distinctive crescent shape, highly recognizable. Makes eyes light up, super cool! Smooth glossy surface, crescent moon shape, metal B pull ring, cowhide texture very good! Ladies, keep buying!! 🖤
Small: 19x8x21cm
Large: 23x10x24cm, Model 2256
